stemHtml: A solid reception of the TOWER frequency 118.2 MHz can be expected when the…

options.a: Aircraft is at low level, in the vicinity of the ground station, in the radio shadow zone of a hill.
options.b: Aircraft is at low level, far away from the ground station, in the radio shadow zone of a hill.
options.c: Aircraft is at low level but far away from the ground station.
options.d: Aircraft is at high level in the vicinity of the ground station.
